{"code":"
# Fetch all open pull requests
open_prs = github.list_pull_requests(state="open")

# Filter for PRs with more than 400 additions and no Linear issue
filtered = [pr for pr in open_prs if pr["additions"] > 400 and (pr["closes_linear"] is None or pr["closes_linear"] == "")]

# Check the shape of the first PR to understand fields
list(open_prs[0].keys()) if open_prs else []…(+4)
